posts.caption:
📚🌿 A little literary charm for your kitchen! 🌿📚

This vintage Westwood “Library Book” Spice Set turns everyday seasonings into a delightful display. Designed to look like a row of classic books, each spice jar is labeled as its own “volume” and rests neatly on its wooden shelf.

Perfect for:
✨ Cottage kitchens
✨ Vintage collectors
✨ Book lovers
✨ Unique housewarming gifts

Functional, whimsical, and full of nostalgic character, this charming set proves that even your spices deserve a place in the story!

🍀 For those lucky enough to find it
🛍️ Available at HoraethHaven.com
🫱🏻‍🫲🏾 Make us an Offer!

📦✨ There’s something special about opening a package and discovering a little piece of history inside.

At Hiraeth Haven, every item is carefully wrapped and sent on its next journey, from our collection to your home. Whether it’s a vintage treasure, a timeless piece of glassware, or a nostalgic find that brings back memories, we love being part of that moment when the wrapping comes off.

What’s your favorite vintage treasure you’ve ever found?

🍊✨ A little slice of old Florida charm! ✨🍊

Fresh from the citrus groves of nostalgia, this vintage Florida Orange Salt & Pepper Shaker set is bursting with sunshine, character, and kitschy mid-century appeal. Complete with its charming orange tree display, it’s the perfect conversation piece for a vintage kitchen, Florida collector, or anyone who loves unique decor with a story to tell.

Whether displayed on a shelf or brightening up your dining table, this sweet set brings a touch of retro sunshine wherever it goes. ☀️

🍀 For those lucky enough to find it

🚨 Tiny Floofs Alert 🚨

This HOMCO Persian cat family looks like they just heard the treat bag crinkle from three rooms away. 👀🐾 With their fluffy coats, big blue eyes, and perfectly curious expressions, this vintage figurine captures peak cat energy: one supervising, one plotting, and one pretending they’re innocent.

Made in Taiwan and full of 1980s charm, this sweet feline family is ready to add a little whimsy to a shelf, curio cabinet, or cozy reading nook.
